findings.issue: PLang test fails with 'Built .pr file not found' — needs a build, not a code issue
findings.impact: Test cannot run without building first. Unrelated to the terminology rename.
findings.suggestion: Run 'plang p build' from Tests/Runtime2/ to generate the missing .pr file

summary: Terminology rename is clean and complete. All 6 rename surfaces verified independently: namespace (PLang.Runtime2.modules), interface (IAction), library field (_actions), tuple field (Action), error key (ActionError), source generator literals. Zero stale references remain. 1423/1423 C# tests pass. 17/18 PLang tests pass (1 failure is a missing .pr file unrelated to the rename). No false greens detected — test assertions correctly check the new error key 'ActionError' at all production sites.
